modal.analyzing: The grimoire is analyzing your answer…
modal.successFeedback: ✦ The runes light up… the grimoire accepts your answer!
modal.errorFeedback: The runes have faded… that's not the right word.
modal.alreadyAccepted: ✦ The grimoire has already accepted your answer

locked.forgeKey: Forge a key in the Forge to break the seal

doubt.title: The grimoire hesitates
doubt.question: Are you sure you want to submit

5.title: The invisible crack
5.question: Everyone here sees the extraordinary effortlessly. I need help to see the ordinary. And yet, I'm the only one who saw what was about to destroy us
5.successFlavor: The crack lights up… What was invisible becomes obvious.

loveLetter.signature: The most beautiful gift that exists
loveLetter.message:
Like Mirabel, you don't need any magical power to be extraordinary.
      
Where others stop, you keep going.
Where walls crack, you lay your hands and rebuild, gently, silently, with a strength that few people even know how to recognize
      
You are the one who repairs my invisible cracks, who holds everything together by the sheer force of your heart.
      
And that, my love, is the most beautiful gift that exists.
Having you by my side is the chance of my life

Y.title: The voices of the sky
Y.question: Every year, the sky speaks to me. Hundreds of silent voices float towards me, and I'm the only one who believes they're looking for me. Everyone sees a celebration. I see a question
Y.successFlavor: The voices finally fall silent, their message was always meant for you.

loveLetter.message:
You are my Rapunzel. There is in you this light that nothing can extinguish.
        
By your side, I learned to dream again. You showed me how to look up, how to see the beauty I was letting pass.
        
Your emotions and your joy radiate and without us realizing it, transform everything they touch.
        
The moments I live with you are like lanterns rising in the sky: fragile, luminous, and yet capable of illuminating my inner sky (which struggles to feel).
        
You are my most beautiful dream, the one I live awake.

2g.title: The dance of the stars
2g.question:
He invited me to dance without a word and without music. His hand couldn't find mine. His body went the wrong way. He looked like anything but a dancer.
      
His eyes carried what my calculations cannot solve:
"the desire to be there, with him, near me."
2g.successFlavor: The stars finish their dance… and it's you they chose.

loveLetter.message:
Like Wall-E, you move forward. Gently, stubbornly, even when everything piles up, even when it weighs heavy. You don't make noise with your strength, you carry it, and it shows in everything you go through without ever losing what makes you you
        
You remind me that love is simple. It's being there, side by side. No need to be someone we're not.
      
And if I had to keep one thing from you, it would be exactly that: the way you taught me that life, in the end, doesn't need to be grand to be beautiful

F.title: The golden frame
F.question:
I was confused with a law.
I am a name, just a name.
Banished, yes. But hanging there, right in front, in a golden frame that nobody looks at
F.successFlavor: The golden frame reveals its secret. The vision was right in front of you.

loveLetter.message:
Like Bruno, you see what others don't see. Through this deep sensitivity that lives in you and that few people truly recognize, you perceive emotions, unspoken words, details that nobody else notices. You have this gift of seeing the invisible, of feeling what is hidden.

You carry a lot.
Others' emotions cling to you, and you welcome them without complaining, but I know it weighs heavy, sometimes.
I see it. And I want you to know that I will always be there to help you lighten that weight, to support you, to love you, even in the moments when you feel overwhelmed.
        
If only you could see what my eyes see when they look at you, you would finally understand that you deserve to be proud of the woman you are.

X.title: The weight of a smile
X.question: The day my strength wavered, I wasn't afraid of suffering. I was afraid that no one would look at me anymore. Because here, they don't love me for who I am, they love me for what I lift.
X.successFlavor: The mask falls. Behind the smile, an unshakeable strength.

loveLetter.message:
Like Luisa, you carry others, their sorrows, their needs, their urgencies, with a reliability that everyone notices without ever truly measuring what it costs you.
        
What you brought me is this rare certainty, knowing that you are there. Truly there. Unconditionally. You taught me what it means to be someone you can count on.
        
So now it's my turn. With me, you can put everything down. The strength, the weight, the appearances.
Your vulnerability is not a weakness, it's the part of you that few people know, and that I cherish more than anything.
        
You spent your life being there for others. I will be there for you. I don't promise to carry everything in your place. I promise to never let you carry it alone.

2d.title: The forgotten directive
2d.question: I fly without wings. I see without pupils. I kill without anger. And I love without a program. Among these four sentences, only one was not planned in my specifications. It's also the only one that matters.
2d.successFlavor: The forgotten directive awakens. Love never needed a program.

loveLetter.message:
Like EVE, you have this grace that disarms me every time. You are brilliant, determined, capable of anything, and it's when you're not aware of your beauty that it strikes me the most
        
A look, a smile, a hand placed on mine.
        
You taught me that love is not written in a program, it's a choice you make every morning. And every morning, my heart chooses you.
